title: Explicit native-u16 plan spec cache
objective: Extend the plan-carried simple FITS spec cache to explicit --resident-fits-read-mode native_u16_gpu so manual raw-u16 runs avoid repeated resident-run header probes.

code_changes.resident_selection: Refactors raw-u16 spec collection so guarded-auto and explicit native_u16_gpu share plan-carried SimpleFitsImageSpec cache construction.
code_changes.artifact_contract: Explicit native_u16_gpu now records checked, eligible, spec_cache_frame_count, spec_source_counts, plan_header_spec_count, and file_header_probe_count.
code_changes.compatibility: Non-native explicit modes and legacy plans without cached specs keep the previous fallback behavior.

cuda.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

clean_room.statement: The gate uses GLASS plan metadata, GLASS timing artifacts, GLASS output hashes, and user-generated WBPP black-box output/timing. It does not inspect or reuse external implementation source.

known_limitations: The benefit applies when explicit native_u16_gpu runs use regenerated plans containing GLASS_SIMPLE_FITS_SPEC.
Explicit native_u16_gpu still requires compatible FITS inputs and the native raw-u16 CUDA method.
The larger remaining bottleneck is raw file read plus H2D/calibration overlap, not selection-time header parsing.
next_step: Reduce Python Future/thread orchestration or move batch raw FITS reads deeper into native code while preserving bitwise 200-light outputs.
